general: Best seller item name from the site

exact_product.note: Browse the site first to find real product names to test

typo_tolerance.description: Misspelled queries — should still return relevant results

cosmetics: gift for my mom who likes skincare
something to help with dry skin in winter
fashion: comfortable work shoes for standing all day
electronics: laptop for a college student under 1000
general: what should I buy for a birthday gift

short_vague.description: One-word or very short queries — tests broad matching and ranking

multi_attribute.description: Queries combining multiple facets — tests attribute search

electronics: wireless earbuds under $100 with noise cancelling

synonyms.description: Different words for the same thing — tests synonym handling

examples_by_vertical.general: Pick 2-3 synonym pairs relevant to the site's catalog

category_navigation.description: Category-level terms — should show relevant category or filtered results

examples_by_vertical.general: Use the site's main navigation categories as queries

stopwords_language.description: Queries with stopwords and language-specific processing — tests that filler words don't break relevance

cosmetics: the best foundation for dry skin

patterns: Articles: 'a', 'an', 'the' — should be ignored without losing intent
stopwords_language.note: Compare results with and without stopwords — e.g. 'face cream' vs 'cream for the face' should return similar results

edge_cases.description: Unusual inputs — tests error handling and zero-result experience
